info.title: CTIX Proxy API for Security Copilot
info.description: Security Copilot-facing CTIX API spec routed through the Render proxy. The proxy preserves method, path, query, headers, and body, and injects CTIX AccessID/Signature/Expires query authentication on the server side.

get.description:
Checks the server connectivity.

#### Request Parameters

This API endpoint does not require any input parameters.

#### Response Parameters

| **Parameter** | **Type** | **Description** |
| --- | --- | --- |
| result | String | Returns the pong response which means connectivity to the server has been established. |

Retrieve the collections associated with a STIX source. #### Request Parameters None #### Response Parameters: | **Parameter** | **Type** | **Description** | | --- | --- | --- | | next | String | Returns the URL link to the next page. | | previous | String | Returns the URL link to the previous page. | | total | Integer | Returns the total number of entries. | | page_size | Integer | Returns the total number of entries per page. | | results | Array | Returns a list of JSON objects for the collections. | | id | String | Returns the ID of the collection. | | name | String | Returns the name of the collection. | | host | String | Returns the host of the discovery service URL. | | source | JSON Object | Returns ID and name of the source. | | start_time | Timestamp | Returns the time in EPOCH format when the collection was last polled. | | subscribed | Boolean | Returns true if the collection is subscribed, else returns false. | | subscribed_once | Boolean | Returns true if the collection is subscribed at least once, else returns false. | | status | Integer | Returns the status of the last polling.
0: Error
1: Success | | status_reason | String | Returns the reason for the last polling failure. | | is_editable | Boolean | Returns true if the collection data is configurable, else returns false. | | score | Integer | Returns the confidence score between 0 to 100. | | created | Timestamp | Returns the time when the collection was created. | | modified | Timestamp | Returns the time when collection data was last modified. | | taxii_version | String | Returns the TAXII version, such as 1.x, 2, or 2.1. | | subscriber_id | String | Returns the ID of the subscriber. | | inbox | JSON Object | Returns the status and URL of the inbox attached to the collection. | | polling | JSON Object | Returns information, such as the status of the polling, if polled at least once from the collection, URLs of the collections, polling time, last polled time. |

parameters.name: source
parameters.description: Pass the ID of the source to retrieve collections.

parameters.name: category
parameters.description: Pass the ID of the source category to filter result.

parameters.name: page
parameters.description: Pass the page number to retrieve records.

parameters.name: page_size
parameters.description: Pass the number of records to retrieve per page.

parameters.name: sort
parameters.description: Pass -polling.last_polling_time to sort records based on the last polling time in descending order. Pass polling.last_polling_time to sort in ascending order.

parameters.name: import
parameters.description: Pass true to fetch import collections. Default value is true.

parameters.name: nominal
parameters.description: [Boolean] Pass true to apply the CQL query.

get.description:
Retrieve the details of a STIX source collection. #### Request Parameters None #### Response Parameters: | **Parameter** | **Type** | **Description** | | --- | --- | --- | | id | String | Returns the ID of the collection. | | name | String | Returns the name of the collection. | | host | String | Returns the host of the discovery service URL. | | source | JSON Object | Returns ID and name of the source. | | start_time | Timestamp | Returns the time in EPOCH format when the collection was last polled. | | subscribed | Boolean | Returns true if the collection is subscribed, else returns false. | | subscribed_once | Boolean | Returns true if the collection is subscribed at least once, else returns false. | | status | Integer | Returns the status of the last polling.
0: Error
1: Success | | status_reason | String | Returns the reason for the last polling failure. | | is_editable | Boolean | Returns true if the collection data is configurable, else returns false. | | score | Integer | Returns the confidence score between 0 to 100. | | created | Timestamp | Returns the time when the collection was created. | | modified | Timestamp | Returns the time when collection data was last modified. | | taxii_version | String | Returns the TAXII version, such as 1.x, 2, or 2.1. | | subscriber_id | String | Returns the ID of the subscriber. | | inbox | JSON Object | Returns the status and URL of the inbox attached to the collection. | | polling | JSON Object | Returns information, such as the status of the polling, if polled at least once from the collection, URLs of the collections, polling time, last polled time. |

parameters.name: collection_id
parameters.description: Pass the ID of a collection.

get.description:
Retrieve a list of custom STIX sources configured in the platform

#### Request Parameters

None

#### Response Parameters:

| **Parameter** | **Type** | **Description** |
| --- | --- | --- |
| next | String | Returns URL link for next page. |
| previous | String | Returns URL link to the previous page. |
| page_size | Integer | Returns the number of records per page. |
| total | Integer | Returns the total number of STIX sources configured in the platform. |
| results | Array | Returns a list of JSON objects for STIX source details. |
| id | String | Returns the unique ID of the STIX source. |
| name | String | Returns the source name. |
| created_by | String | Returns the ID of the creator. Returns null for out-of-the-box sources. |
| modified_by | String | Returns the ID of the user who modified the source. |
| is_active | Boolean | Returns true if the source is in active state. |
| created | Timestamp | Returns the created time of the source in EPOCH format. |
| score | Integer | Returns the Confidence Score of the source. |
| status | Boolean | Returns true if source credentials are in a working state, else returns false. Also to state if polling is working properly. |
| is_editable | Boolean | Returns true if the source configuration is editable. |
| description | String | Returns the description of the source. |
| category | JSON | Returns the details of the source category. |
| source_order | Integer | Returns the source order. |
| source_type | String | Returns the type of source. CUSTOM_STIX_SOURCES is the default value for all custom STIX sources. |
| create_intel_feed | Boolean | Returns true if intel is available to create intel in the platform, else returns false. |
| ssl_encrypted | Boolean | Returns true if SSL encryption is enabled, else returns false. |
| username | String | Returns the username of the TAXII credentials for the source. |
| service | String | Returns the discovery service URL of the source. |
| subscriber_id | String | Returns the ID of the subscriber. |
| service | String | Returns the TAXII URL of the source. |
| key_file | JSON | Returns the key details associated with the certificate. The key details are used for certificate-based authentication to retrieve data from the TAXII URL. |
| cert_file | JSON | Returns the certificate details. The key details are used for certificate-based authentication to retrieve data from the TAXII URL. |
| authentication_type | Integer | Returns the authentication type configured for the source. |
| taxii_option | String | Returns the TAXII version of the source. |
| verify_ssl | Boolean | Returns true if the SSL certificate verification is enabled for the source. |
| is_removable | Boolean | Returns true if the source can be removed. |
| last_feed_notify | Integer | Returns the time in minutes in which you get a notification if no feeds are received. |

parameters.name: created_to
parameters.description: Pass the created to time in EPOCH format.

parameters.name: category
parameters.description: Pass the ID of a STIX source category to filter result.

parameters.name: page_size
parameters.description: Pass the number of records to retrieve per page.

parameters.name: taxii_option
parameters.description: Pass the STIX version to filter sources. Allowed values: 1, 2, 2.1

parameters.name: created_from
parameters.description: Pass the created from time in EPOCH format.

parameters.name: q
parameters.description: Pass a keyword to search the STIX source name.

parameters.name: page
parameters.description: Pass the page number to retrieve result.

get.description:
STIX sources are classified into categories such as Community, Open Source, Subscriber, and System feed. Use this API to retrieve a list of all available STIX source categories.

#### Request Parameters

None

#### Response Parameters

| **Parameter** | **Type** | **Description** |
| --- | --- | --- |
| id | String | Returns the ID of the STIX source category. |
| name | String | Returns the name of the STIX source category. |
| default | Boolean | Returns true if the category is the default category. |
| is_remove | Boolean | Returns true is the category has been deleted. |

schema.example: GET, POST, PUT, DELETE, HEAD, OPTIONS

get.description:
Returns a paginated list of available API feed source integrations. #### Request Parameters None #### Response Parameters | **Parameter** | **Type** | **Description** | | --- | --- | --- | | next | String | Returns the URL link to the next page. | | previous | String | Returns the URL link to the previous page. | | total | Integer | Returns the total number of application connectors. | | id | String | Returns the ID of the feed source. | | title | String | Returns the name of the feed source. | | third_party_logo | String | Returns the path for the logo image of the feed source. | | access_key_name | String | Returns the name for the access key field. | | access_key_type | String | Returns the access key type, for example, text. | | access_key_required | Bool | Returns True if an access key is required, else returns False. | | secret_key_name | String | Returns the name for the secret key field. | | secret_key_type | String | Returns the type of secret key, for example, text. | | secret_key_required | Bool | Returns True if a secret key is required for authentication, else returns False. | | order | Integer | Returns the order of this feed source connector.
Default value: 10 | | default_api_url | String | Returns the default URL of the API feed source. | | default_api_url_required | Boolean | | | category | String | Returns the category of the feed source, such as Cyware Product, Security Information and Event Management System, SIEM, Devops, Email, Endpoint, Information, Network Security, Reputation, Sandbox, and more. | | actions | Array of string | Returns action IDs of the feed source in array of string. | | is_active | Boolean | Returns true if the API feed source is active, else false. | | configured_once | Boolean | Returns true if the API feed source is configured once, else false. |

parameters.name: page
parameters.description: Pass the page number to retrieve records. Default: 1

parameters.name: page_size
parameters.description: Pass the number of records to retrieve per page. Default: 10

parameters.name: full_list
parameters.description: Pass true to retrieve all API feed sources without pagination

parameters.name: q
parameters.description: Pass a keyword to search API feed sources based on the title.

parameters.name: is_active
parameters.description: Pass true to retrieve active API feed sources. By default, all available feed sources are retrieved.

get.description:
Retrieves all available actions and feed channels of API feed source. #### Request Parameters This API endpoint does not require any input parameters. #### Response Parameters | **Parameters** | **Type** | **Description** | | --- | --- | --- | | name | String | Returns the name of the account. | | third_party_config_id | String | Returns the ID of the account. | | is_active | Boolean | Returns true if the account is active, else false. | | actions | Array of JSON Objects | Returns all the configured actions. | | polling_type | String | Returns the polling type. Allowed values: Returns A if the polling type is auto.
Returns M if the polling type is manual. | | working status | String | Returns the working status of the feed. Allowed values: `RUNNING`, `CONNECTION ERROR`. | | working_status_comment | String | Returns the working status comment. For example, _Empty Data Error_. | | action_config_id | String | Returns the action configuration ID. | | connector_name | String | Returns the name of the API feed source. | | name | String | Returns the instance name. | | poll_frequency | Integer | Returns the polling frequency in seconds. | | collection | String | Returns the collection name. | | last_polled | Timestamp | Returns the date and time when the intel was last polled. | | action_slug | String | Returns the slug vale of the action. | | collection_id | String | Returns the collection ID. | | modified | Timestamp | Returns the date and time when the configuration was last modified. | | is_configured | Bool | Returns true if the action is configured, else returns false. | | third_party_action_id | String | Returns the id for an action. |

parameters.name: app_id
parameters.description: Pass the ID of the API feed source.

get.description:
Returns configuration details of a API feed connector.

#### Request Parameters

This API endpoint does not require any input parameters.

#### Response Parameters

| **Parameter** | **Type** | **Description** |
| --- | --- | --- |
| id | String | Returns the ID of the API feed connector. |
| title | String | Returns the title of the API feed connector. |
| slug | String | Returns the slug value of the API feed connector. |
| description | String | Returns the description of the API feed connector. |
| third_party_logo | String | Returns the path for the image of the API feed connector. |
| category | String | Returns the category of the API feed category. For example, _threat_feed_provider_. |
| version | String | Returns the version of the API feed connector. |
| create_intel_feed | Boolean | Returns true if the API feed connector provides intel feeds, else returns false. |
| metadata | JSON Objects | Returns the configuration variables needed for the API feed connector, such as, access key, secret key, polling limits and more. |
| max_poll_days_limit_apifeeds | Integer | Returns the maximum days for polling API feeds. |
| feed_type | String | Returns the type of feed. For example, _System Feeds_. |
| source_id | String | Returns the ID of the source. |
| is_active | Boolean | Returns true if the API feed connector is active, else false. |

parameters.name: app_id
parameters.description: Pass the unique ID of the API feed source. You can use Retrieve API Feeds to get ID.

get.description:
Returns the saved details of an API feed account of an API feed connector.

#### Request Parameters

This API endpoint does not require any input parameters.

#### Response Parameters

| **Parameter** | **Type** | **Description** |
| --- | --- | --- |
| id | String | Returns the ID of the API feed connector. |
| name | String | Returns the name of the account or instance. |
| secret_key | String | Returns the secret key credentails of the API feed connector. |
| verify_ssl | Boolean | Returns true if verify using SSL is configured, else false. |
| base_url | String | Returns the base URL link of the account. |
| access_key | String | Returns the access key credentials of the API feed connector. |
| is_active | Boolean | Returns true if the account is active, else false. |
| extra_fields | JSON Objects | Returns any additional configuration values for the account such as user name, and password. |
| proxy_url | String | Returns the proxy URL. |

schema.example: GET, POST, PUT, DELETE, HEAD, OPTIONS

| **Parameter** | **Type** | **Description** |

| secret_key | String | Returns the secret key credentials configured to access the account. |
| verify_ssl | Boolean | Returns true if verify using SSL is configured, else false. |
| name | String | Returns the name of the account. |
| base_url | String | Returns the base URL used to access the account. |
| access_key | String | Returns the access key credentials of the account. |
| is_active | Bool | Returns true if the account is active, else returns false. |
| extra_fields | Array | Returns any additional configuration values for the account. |

get.description:
Returns the saved configuration for all the feed channels of an API feed account.

#### Request Parameters

This API endpoint does not require any input parameters.

#### Response Parameters

| **Parameter** | **Type** | **Description** |
| --- | --- | --- |
| slug | String | Returns the name of the action. |
| id | String | Returns the unique identifier for the action. |
| working_status | JSON Object | Returns the working status of the action such as code, value, description. |
| action_type | String | Returns the type of action. For example, if action type is polling, P is returned. |
| show_related_fields | Boolean | Returns a true if related information is shown. |
| is_active | Bool | Returns true if the account is active, else returns false. |
| polling_time | Integer | Returns the time duration for automatic polling in seconds. |
| polling_type | String | Returns **A** If the automatic polling type is configured else **M** if the manual polling type is configured. |
| retry_on_broken | Bool | Returns true if the setting to automatically retry a broken connection is enabled, else returns false. |
| retry_interval | Integer | Returns the time duration configured for retrying a broken connection attempt. |
| exponential_retry | Bool | Returns true if the setting to increase the time duration between failed retry attempts is enabled, else returns false |
| is_configured | Bool | Returns true if the app is configured else returns false. |
| collection_id | UUID | Returns the ID of the collection related to the action. |

parameters.name: third_party_config_id
parameters.description: [Optional]Pass the unique ID of the API feed account

parameters.description: Pass the unique ID of the API feed connector.

| exponential_retry | Boolean | Returns true if the setting to increase the time duration between failed retry attempts is enabled, else returns false. |
| is_configured | Boolean | Returns true if the app is configured else returns false. |
| collection_id | String | Returns the ID of the collection related to the action. |

get.description:
Retrieves the RSS feed sources.

#### Request Parameters

This endpoint does not require any request parameters.

#### Response Parameters

| **Parameters** | **Type** | **Description** |
| --- | --- | --- |
| next | String | Returns the link to next page. |
| previous | String | Returns the link to previous page. |
| page_size | Integer | Returns the number of RSS feed sources retrieved per page. |
| total | Integer | Returns the total number of RSS feed sources. |
| results | Array of JSON Objects | Returns the array of RSS feed sources. |
| id | String | Returns the ID of the RSS feed source. |
| name | String | Returns the name of the RSS feed source |
| created_by | String | Returns the ID of the user who created the feed source. |
| is_active | Boolean | Returns true if the RSS feed source is active. |
| created | Timestamp | Returns the created date and time in EPOCH format. |
| is_editable | Boolean | Returns true if the RSS feed source is editable. |
| ssl_encrypted | Boolean | Returns true if the verify SSL is configured, else false |
| taxii_option | String | Returns version of TAXII. |

parameters.name: page
parameters.description: Pass the page number to retrieve RSS feed source. Default is 1.

parameters.name: page_size
parameters.description: Pass the number of RSS feed sources to be reterived per page. Default is 10.

parameters.name: created_from
parameters.description: Pass the created from time in EPOCH format to filter RSS feed source.

parameters.name: created_to
parameters.description: Pass the created to time in EPOCH format to filter RSS feed source.

parameters.name: q
parameters.description: Pass the keyword to search RSS feed source based on the title.

parameters.name: is_active
parameters.description: Pass true to retrieve active RSS feed sources, else false.

get.description:
Returns the details for a particular RSS feed source. #### **Request Parameters** This API endpoint does not require any input parameters. #### **Response Parameters** | **Parameter** | **Type** | **Description** | | --- | --- | --- | | id | String | Returns the ID of the RSS feed source. | | name | String | Returns the name for the RSS feed. | | created_by | String | Returns the user ID that created the source. | | modified_by | String | Returns the user ID that modified the source. | | is_active | Boolean | Returns true if the RSS feed source is active, else returns false. | | created | Integer | Returns the time of the creation of the feed. | | score | integer | Returns the confidence score of the feed. | | status | Boolean | Returns the status of the RSS feed. | | is_editable | Boolean | Returns true if the RSS feed is editable, else returns false. | | description | String | Returns the description of the RSS feed. | | category | JSON Objects | Returns the category of the RSS feed. | | source_order | Integer | Returns the order in which the source is received. | | source_type | String | Returns the source type, such as RSS feeds. | | create_intel_feed | Boolean | Returns true if intel is created from this RSS feed, else returns false. | | ssl_encrypted | Boolean | Returns true if the SSL certificate of this connection is verified, else returns false. | | url | String | Returns the URL of the RSS feed. | | polling_frequency | Integer | Returns the polling frequency of the RSS feed. | | parse_visible_content_only | Boolean | Returns true if only the visible content is parsed from the RSS feed, else returns false. | | default_metadata | JSON Objects | Contains
**tlp:** string, values can be AMBER,GREEN,WHITE,RED,NONE .
**score:** confidence score for the soure. Values between 0 to 100. default:100
**tags**: Contains list of tags selected bu user . Contains id,name and some tag related values
**selected:** Boolean indicating wether the default_metadata to be applied to report . If not use default values for the metadata.
**is_apply_all**: Boolean indicating wether to apply metadata to all objects/IOCS created. If not used default values for metadata.
**Default Values: tlp: WHITE, score:100, tags:\[\], selected:true, is_apply_all:tru**e |

schema.example: GET, PUT, PATCH, DELETE, HEAD, OPTIONS

| is_active | Boolean | Returns true if the source is active, else returns false. |

| is_editable | Boolean | Returns true if the source is editable, else false. |
| category | JSON Object | Returns the source category deatils such as ID, name, and is default. |
| default_metadata | JSON Object | Returns the default metadata configured for the email feed source such as tlp, score, tags, default_marking_defination. |
| score | Integer | Returns the default confidence score value defined for the source. |

| tags | Array of JSON Objects | Returns the tags added in the metadata. |

| default_marking_definition |  |  |
| custom_scores | JSON Objects | Returns the custom scores configured. |
| protocol_type | String | Returns the type of protocol. |
| taxii_option | String | Returns the TAXII version. |
| connection_status | Boolean | Returns true if the email source is able to connect to CTIX, else returns false. |

| **Parameters** | **Type** | **Description** |

| name | String | Returns the name of the email source. |
| id | String | Returns the unique ID of the email source. |
| created_by | String | Returns the ID of the user who created this Source. |
| modified_by | String | Returns the ID of the user who last modified the source. |
| is_active | Boolean | Returns true if the source is active, else returns false. |
| created | Timestamp | Returns the date and time of the source creation in EPOCH format. |
| is_editable | Boolean | Returns true if the source is editable, else returns false. |
| description | String | Returns the description of the source. |
| category | JSON Object | Returns the source category such as ID, name and is default. |
| score | Integer | Returns the confidence score value defined for the source. |
| source_type | String | Returns the type of source. |
| create_intel_feed | Boolean | Returns true if intel is created automatically, else returns false. |
| ssl_encrypted | Boolean | Returns true if the SSL connection of this source is verified, else returns false. |
| username | String | Returns the email ID of the source. |
| intel_objects | JSON Object | Returns object types configured to createintel automatically. |
| taxii_option | String | Returns TAXII version. |
| allowed_email | Array of String | Returns the list of allowed email IDs. |
| protocol_type | String | Returns the protocol type of the email source, such as IMAP. |
| auth_type | String | Returns the authentication type for the protocol. (Applicable only when protocol_type is EWS.) |
| oauth_client_id | String | Returns the client ID of the email source. (Applicable for EWS email source.) |

| host_url | String | Returns the domain name of the email account. |
| port_value | Integer | Returns the port number. |
| create_intel_feed_senders | Array of String | Returns the list of email IDs for which the intel is automatically created from the messages received from these email IDs. |

| regulatory_emails | Array of String | Returns a list of email IDs, that are marked as regulatory email IDs. |

| last_connection_time | Integer | Returns the last timestamp, when Intel Exchange connects to the email server. |
| include_attachment_ioc | Boolean | Returns true if the IOCs from email attachments should be included while creating intel. |
| include_attachment_artifact | Boolean | Returns true if attachments should be included as artifacts while creating intel. |
| parse_visible_content_only | Boolean | Returns true if the visible content has to be parsed, else returns false. |
| connection_status | Boolean | Returns true if the email source is able to connect to CTIX, else returns false. |
| default_metadata | JSON Object | Returns the default metadata configured for the email such as tlp, score, tags, marking_config, default_marking_definition, and custom_scores. |

get.description:
Retrieve a list of active and inactive inboxing subscribers configured Intel Exchange for a specific time frame.

## Response Parameters

| **Parameter** | **Type** | **Description** |
| --- | --- | --- |
| next | Integer | Returns a link to the next page of pagination. |
| previous | Integer | Returns a link to the previous page of pagination. |
| page_size | Integer | Returns the number of records returned per page. |
| total | Integer | Returns the total number of records on the platform. |
| results | Array of Objects | Returns JSON objects for the subscriber details. |
| id | String | Returns the ID of an inboxing record. |
| subscriber_id | String | Returns the ID of a subscriber. |
| name | String | Returns the name of a subscriber. |
| stix_version | String | Returns the STIX version of the threat data objects inboxed for active subscribers. Returns null for inactive subscribers. |
| object_count | Integer | Returns the number of threat data objects inboxed for active subscribers. Returns 0 for inactive subscribers. |
| last_inbox | Timestamp | Returns the last inboxed time in EPOCH format for active subscribers. Returns null for inactive subscribers. |
| collection | Dictionary | Returns the details of the collection into which threat data objects were inboxed. |
| collection: name | String | Returns the name of the collection. |
| collection: id | String | Returns the ID of the collection. |
| hide_aggregate_col | Boolean | Returns true of the aggregated columns are hidden, else returns false. |

get.description:
Returns a list of subscribers configured in the Intel Exchange platform.

#### Request Parameters

This endpoint does not require any request parameter.

#### Response Parameters

| **Parameter** | **Type** | **Description** |
| --- | --- | --- |
| next | String | Returns a link to the next page. |
| previous | String | Returns a link to the previous page. |
| page_size | Integer | Returns the number of records retrieved per page. |
| total | Integer | Returns the total number of subscribers in the platform. |
| results | List | Returns the list of subscriber objects. For more information, see the Result Objects. |
| discovery_url | String | Returns the TAXII discovery URL. |
| taxii_enabled | Boolean | Returns true if the TAXII requests are enabled, else returns false. |
| misp_enabled | Boolean | Returns true if the MISP requests are enabled, else returns false. |

#### The Results Object

| **Parameter** | **Type** | **Description** |
| --- | --- | --- |
| id | String | Returns the ID of the subscriber. |
| name | String | Returns the name of the subscriber. |
| username | String | Returns the username for TAXII authentication credentials. |
| created | Timestamp | Returns the created time of the subscriber in EPOCH format. |
| modified | Timestamp | Returns the last modified time of the subscriber in EPOCH format. |
| last_pull | Timestamp | Returns the recent timestamp at which the subscriber polled for data from the TAXII or MISP server. |
| created_by | String | Returns the ID of the creator of the subscriber. |
| last_modified_by | String | Returns the ID of the modifier of the subscriber. |
| organization_name | String | Returns the subscriber organization name. |
| organization_types | JSON Object | Returns the details of the organization type. |
| is_active | Boolean | Returns true if the subscriber is active, else returns false. |
| primary_contact | JSON Object | Returns the primary contact details like name, email, number, and address of the subscriber. |
| secondary_contact | JSON Object | Returns the secondary contact details like name, email, address, and contact of the subscriber. |
| confidence_score | Integer | Returns the confidence score assigned to the subscriber. |
| white_list_ip | Array | Returns the allowed list of IP addresses from which TAXII or MISP requests are allowed for the subscriber. |
| is_basic_auth_enabled | Boolean | Returns true if basic authentication is enabled for this subscriber, else returns false. |
| is_certificate_auth_enabled | Boolean | Returns true if authentication using certificate is enabled, else returns false. |
| certificates | Array | Returns the list of certificates of the subsriber. |
| misp_url | String | Returns the MISP server URL of the subscriber. |
| taxii_enabled | Boolean | Returns true if the TAXII requests are allowed for this subscriber, else returns false. |
| misp_enabled | Boolean | Returns true if the MISP requests are allowed for this subscriber, else returns false. |

parameters.name: page
parameters.description: Pass the page number to retrieve records. Default value: 1

get.description:
Retrieves the list of CTIX users in a paginated format. #### Request Parameters None #### Response Parameters | **Parameter** | **Type** | **Description** | | --- | --- | --- | | id | String | Returns the unique ID assigned to the user. This ID is used across the CTIX application to perform various actions. | | first_name | String | Returns the first name of the user. | | last_name | String | Returns the last name of the user. | | email | String | Returns the associated email ID of the user on which CTIX sends all the emails. | | contact_number | String | Returns the mobile or telephone number of the user. | | country_code | String | Returns the country code of the user. | | user_id | String | Returns the unique ID of the user. This ID is used across the CTIX application to perform various actions. | | username | String | Returns the LDAP username associated with a user. | | invite_status | String | Returns the invitation status of the user, such as Accepted or Invited. | | image_url | String | Return the URL link of the image. | | is_active | Bool | Returns True if the user is active on the platform. Else returns False. | | is_blocked | Bool | Returns True if the user is blocked, else returns False.
A user can get blocked if the user has entered the wrong password more than a defined number of times. | | last_active_session | Integer | Returns the last active date and time of the user. | | created | Integer | Returns the date and time at which the user was created. | | invited_by | Dictionary | Returns the details of the user who created a new user in the form of a dictionary. A dictionary includes ID, first_name, last_name, email, is_active, contact_number, and country_code of the user. | | user_groups | List of Dictionary | Returns the list of associated groups for the user which includes group ID and name of the group. | | active_count | Integer | Returns the number of users who are active. | | next | String | Returns the URL endpoint of the next page. | | previous | String | Returns the URL endpoint of the previous page. | | total | Integer | Returns the total number of records that matched the conditions provided in query parameters. | | page_size | Integer | Returns the size of the page. | | results | Array | Returns the list of result objects. |

parameters.name: page
parameters.description: Navigate results by page number.

parameters.name: page_size
parameters.description: Number of records to fetch per page

parameters.name: created_from
parameters.description: Filter users created after this timestamp

parameters.name: created_to
parameters.description: Filter users created before this timestamp

parameters.name: is_active
parameters.description: Filter by active or inactive users

parameters.name: sort
parameters.description: Sorts the user listing based on the field provided. Choices include: created, name, last_active_session. Order can be reversed by prepending - before the key. Eg: -created.

parameters.name: invited_by
parameters.description: Filter users who are invited by a specific user. This parameter expects the user ID.

parameters.name: q
parameters.description: Accepts search queries. The text passed to this parameter is searched against first_name,last_name, email. Case insensitive

parameters.name: is_blocked
parameters.description: Filter blocked or unblocked users.

parameters.name: invite_status
parameters.description: Filter users who have accepted or not accepted the invite to join CTIX. Choices include: ACCEPTED/INVITED

parameters.name: activity_from
parameters.description: Filter users who are active after this timestamp

parameters.name: activity_to
parameters.description: Filter users who are active before this timestamp

parameters.name: group
parameters.description: Filter users of a specific permission group. This paramter expects group id.

post.description:
Use this API to creates a user in CTIX. #### **Request Parameters** | **Parameter** | **Type** | **Mandatory/Optional** | **Description** | | --- | --- | --- | --- | | first_name | String | Mandatory | Pass the first name of the user. | | last_name | String | Mandatory | Pass the last name of the user. | | username | String | Mandatory | Pass the LDAP username associated with a user. | | email | String | Mandatory | Pass the CTIX associated email ID of the user on which all the emails would go. | | is_active | Boolean | Optional | Pass True to make a profile active. Else pass False. | | contact_number | String | Optional | Pass the contact details like the phone number or mobile number of the user. | | country_code | String | Optional | Pass the country code in which the user is located. | | email_alerts | Boolean | Optional | Pass True if the user wants to receive email alerts on the associated CTIX email ID. Else pass False. | | sms_alerts | Boolean | Optional | Pass True if the user wants to receive SMS alerts on CTIX associated contact number. Else pass False. | | groups | Array of Objects | Mandatory | Pass the list of permission groups where the user is enlisted. | | allowed_tlp | Array of Strings | Optional | Pass the list of allowed TLPs a user can access and view threat data. If no TLPs have been selected, the user can access threat data from all TLPs.
Choices: NONE, GREEN, WHITE, RED, AMBER. | #### **Response Parameters** | **Parameters** | **Type** | **Descriptions** | | --- | --- | --- | | id | String | Returns the unique ID for the user. This ID is used across the CTIX application to perform actions. | | first_name | String | Returns the first name of the user. | | last_name | String | Returns the last name of the user. | | email | String | Returns the CTIX associated email ID of the user on which CTIX sends all the emails. | | is_active | Boolean | Returns True if the user is active on the platform, else returns False. | | country_code | String | Returns the country code of the user where the user is located. | | contact_number | String | Returns the contact details like mobile or telephone number of the user. | | user_id | String | Returns the unique ID of the user. This ID is used across the CTIX application to perform actions. | | email_alerts | Boolean | Returns True if the user wants to receive email alerts on the CTIX associated email address, else returns False. | | sms_alerts | Boolean | Returns True if the user wants to receive SMS alerts on CTIX associated contact number, else returns False. | | allowed_tlp | Array of Strings | Returns the list of allowed TLPs from which a user can access and view threat data. You can threat data from all TLPs if no TLPs are selected. | | temporary_password | String | Returns the temporary password generated for a user if SMTP is not configured or disabled. | | details | String | Returns the status of an API success. |

get.description:
Returns the user details of a user.

#### Request Parameters

This API endpoint does not require any input parameters.

#### **Response Parameters**

| **Parameter** | **Type** | **Description** |
| --- | --- | --- |
| ID | String | Returns the unique ID of the user. This ID is used across CTIX to perform actions. |
| first_name | String | Returns the first name of the user. |
| last_name | String | Returns the last name of the user. |
| email | String | Returns the CTIX associated email address of the user. The user receives all CTIX related emails and information on this email address. |
| is_active | Bool | Returns True if the user is active in CTIX, else returns False. |
| contact_number | String | Returns the contact details like mobile or telephone number of the user. |
| country_code | String | Returns the country code in which the user is located. |
| user_id | String | Returns the unique ID for the user. This ID is used across CTIX to perform actions. |
| created | Integer | Returns the date and time of the creation of the user. |
| invited_by | Dictionary | Returns the details of the user who created this user in CTIX in the form of a dictionary. This dictionary includes ID, first_name, last_name, email, is_active, contact_number, and country_code of the user. |
| invite_status | String | Returns the invitation status of the user such as Accepted or Invited. |
| email_alerts | Bool | Returns True if the user wants to receive email alerts on the CTIX associated email address, else returns False. |
| sms_alerts | Bool | Returns True if the user wants to receive SMS alerts on the CTIX associated contact number, else returns False. |
| groups | List of Dictionary | Returns the list of associated user groups for the user. This includes group ID and name of the group. |
| allowed_tlp | List of String | Returns the list of allowed TLPs from which a user can access and view threat data. You can access threat data from all TLPs if TLPs are not selected. |
| username | String | Returns the LDAP username associated with a user. |
| image_url | String | Return the URL link of the image. |
| date_joined | Integer | Returns the date and time at which the user was created. |
| last_active_session | Integer | Returns the last active date and time of the user on the platform. |
| admin_component | List of String | Returns the list of components that are part of the admin component in CTIX. |
| default_page_size | Integer | Returns the default page size for the user for listing APIs. |
| last_login_ip | String | Returns the IP address of the user when the user last logged |
| last_login_location | String | Returns the geographical location including country along with city of the user as per the last login IP address. |

put.description:
Use this API to update the details of a user.

#### **Request Parameters**

| **Parameter** | **Type** | **Mandatory/Optional** | **Description** |
| --- | --- | --- | --- |
| first_name | String | Mandatory | Pass the first name of the user. |
| last_name | String | Mandatory | Pass the last name of the user. |
| is_active | Bool | Optional | Pass True to make a profile active. Else pass False. |
| country_code | String | Optional | Pass the country code in which the user is located. |
| contact_number | String | Optional | Pass the phone number or mobile number of the user. |
| email_alerts | Bool | Optional | Pass True if the user wants to receive email alerts on the associated email ID from CTIX. Else pass False. |
| sms_alerts | Bool | Optional | Pass True if the user wants to receive the sms alerts on the associated contact number from CTIX. Else pass False. |
| groups | List of Dictionary | Mandatory | Pass the list of permission groups for your user. |
| allowed_tlp | List of String | Optional | Pass the list of allowed TLPs a user can access in threat data. You can access threat data information for all TLPs if no TLP value is passed. Choices: NONE, GREEN, WHITE, RED, AMBER. |
| username | String | Mandatory | Pass the LDAP username of the user. |
| default_page_size | Integer | Optional | Pass the default page size for listing APIs for the user. |

post.description:
Use this API to perform bulk operations like activating, deactivating, and unblocking the users.

#### Request Parameters

| **Parameter** | **Type** | **Required** | **Description** |
| --- | --- | --- | --- |
| action | String | Mandatory | Pass the action the administrator wants to apply in bulk to users in CTIX. The supported actions are activate, deactivate, and unblock users. |
| ids | List of Strings | Mandatory | Pass the list of user IDs on which bulk action has to be applied. |

#### Response Parameters

| **Parameter** | **Type** | **Description** |
| --- | --- | --- |
| details | String | Returns the success message that the action has been applied. |

get.description:
### GET /rest-auth/groups/

Returns the user groups in CTIX in a paginated form.

#### Request Parameters

This API endpoint does not require any input parameters.

#### Response Parameters

| **Parameter** | **Type** | **Description** |
| --- | --- | --- |
| next | String | Returns the URL to fetch the next set of records. |
| previous | String | Returns the URL to fetch the previous set of records. |
| page_size | Integer | Returns the number of records you can fetch per page. |
| total | Integer | Returns the total number of user groups. |
| permission_granted | Integer | Returns the total number of available permissions. |
| results | List | Returns the list of user groups. |
| ID | String | Returns the unique ID assigned to the user group. |
| name | String | Returns the name of the user group. |
| description | String | Returns the description of the user group. |
| created_by | Dictionary | Returns the details about the user who created the groups. This field has details like user ID, first_name, last_name, email, is_active, country_code, and contact_number. |
| is_editable | Bool | Returns True if the user group can be edited, else returns False. |
| is_active | Bool | Returns True if the user group is active, else returns False. |
| created | Integer | Returns the date and time of the creation of the user group. |
| permission_count | Integer | Returns the number of permissions associated with the user group from all the available permissions. |
| user_count | Integer | Returns the number of users who are part of the user group. |
| is_read_only | Bool | Returns True if the user group is read-only, else returns False. |
| is_default | Bool | Returns True if the user group is a default group, else returns False. |
| saml_associated_groups | List | Returns the list of SAML associated groups for the user group. |

get.description:
Retrieves a list of custom attributes from the platform. #### Request Parameters This API endpoint does not require any input parameters. #### Response Parameters | **Parameter** | **Type** | **Description** | | --- | --- | --- | | next | String | Returns the URL endpoint of the next page. | | previous | String | Returns the URL endpoint of the previous page. | | total | Integer | Returns the total number of custom attributes available in the platform. | | page_size | Integer | Returns the size of the page. | | results | Array | Returns the list of result objects. | | id | String | Returns the unique ID for the custom attribute. | | name | String | Returns the name of the custom attribute. | | name_slug | String | Returns the slug assigned by the platform to the custom attribute. | | type | Integer | Returns the number associated with the attribute type.
0: Boolean
1: Integer
2: String
3: Single Select
4: Date
5: JSON
6: Float | | description | String | Returns the description of the custom attribute. | | ctix_created | Timestamp | Returns the creation date of the custom attribute. | | ctix_modified | Timestamp | Returns the modification date of the custom attribute. | | choices | Array | Returns the list of options available for a single-select attribute. | | is_actionable | Boolean | Returns true if an attribute can be modified in threat data objects, else returns false. | | status | Integer | Returns the number associated with the attribute status.
0: Inactive
1: Active | | sdo_objects | Array | Returns the list of SDOs on which the attribute is applicable. | | manual | Boolean | Returns true if the attribute is manually created by users, else returns false. |

post.description:
Create a custom attribute in the platform. #### Request Parameters | **Parameter** | **Type** | **Required** | **Description** | | --- | --- | --- | --- | | name | String | Required | Pass a name for the attribute within 100 characters. | | description | String | Optional | Pass a description for the attribute within 500 characters. | | type | Integer | Required | Pass the number associated with the type.
0: Boolean
1: Integer
2: String
3: Single Select
4: Date
5: JSON

get.description:
Retrieve a list of custom objects from the platform.

#### Request Parameters

None

#### Response Parameters

| **Parameter** | **Type** | **Description** |
| --- | --- | --- |
| next | String | Returns the URL endpoint of the next page. |
| previous | String | Returns the URL endpoint of the previous page. |
| total | Integer | Returns the total number of custom objects available in the platform. |
| page_size | Integer | Returns the size of the page. |
| results | Array | Returns the list of the result objects. |
| id | String | Returns the unique ID of the custom object. |
| name | String | Returns the name of the custom object. |
| description | String | Returns the description of the custom object. |
| type | String | Returns the type of the custom object assigned by the platform. |
| ctix_created | Timestamp | Returns the date of creation of the custom object in EPOCH format. |
| ctix_modified | Timestamp | Returns the date of modification of the custom object in EPOCH format. |
| status | Integer | Returns one if the status of the object is active, else returns a random integer if the status of the object is inactive. |
| manual | Boolean | Returns true if the object is manually created by users, else returns false. |
| fields | Array | Returns the list of custom attributes of the custom objects. |
| primary_attribute | String | Returns the primary attribute name of the custom object. |

parameters.name: manual
parameters.description: Pass true to retrieve custom attributes manually created by users. Pass false to retrieve custom attributes created by the system.

parameters.name: q
parameters.description: Pass a keyword to search for objects by the title.

parameters.description: Pass the created_from time in EPOCH format to filter records based the CTIX created time.

parameters.name: ctix_created_to
parameters.description: Pass the created_to time in EPOCH format to filter records based the CTIX created time.

parameters.name: page_size
parameters.description: Pass the number of records to retrieve per page. Default: 10

parameters.name: page
parameters.description: Pass the page number to retrieve records. Default: 1

parameters.name: sort
parameters.description: Pass -ctix_modified to sort records by the last modified date in descending order. Pass ctix_modified to sort records by the last modified date in ascending order.

parameters.name: ctix_modified_from
parameters.description: Pass the modified_from time in EPOCH format to filter records based the CTIX modified time.

parameters.name: ctix_modified_to
parameters.description: Pass the modified_to time in EPOCH format to filter records based the CTIX modified time.

parameters.name: page
parameters.description: Pass the page number to retrieve records. Default: 1

parameters.name: page_size

parameters.name: custom
parameters.description: Pass true to retrieve kill chains manually created by users. Pass false to retrieve system created kill chains.

parameters.description: Pass the created_from time in EPOCH format to filter records based the CTIX created time.

parameters.name: modified_by
parameters.description: Pass the ID of a user to filter records based on the modifier.

parameters.description: Pass -ctix_created to sort records by the last modified date in descending order. Pass ctix_created to sort records by the last modified date in ascending order.

parameters.description: Pass a keyword to search for kill chains by the title.

post.description:
Create a custom kill chain with the phases of the kill chain.

#### Request Parameters

| Parameter | Type | Description |
| --- | --- | --- |
| name | String | Pass a unique name for the kill chain with in 100 characters |
| phases | Array | Pass the names of the phases with in 100 characters to add to the kill chain. |

#### Response Parameters

The API returns a JSON object with the following parameters:

| Parameter | Type | Description |
| --- | --- | --- |
| created_by | Object | Returns the details of the user who created the kill chain |
| ctix_created | Timestamp | Returns the timestamp of creation in Epoch format |
| ctix_modified | Timestamp | Returns the timestamp of modification in Epoch format |
| id | String | Returns the unique ID of the kill chain |
| modified_by | JSON Object | Returns the details of the user who modified the kill chain |
| name | String | Returns the name of the kill chain |
| phases | Array | Returns the phases of the kill chain |

#### Example Response

``` json
{
    "created_by": {
        "email": "",
        "first_name": "",
        "id": "",
        "last_name": ""
    },
    "ctix_created": 0,
    "ctix_modified": 0,
    "id": "",
    "modified_by": {
        "email": "",
        "first_name": "",
        "id": "",
        "last_name": ""
    },
    "name": "",
    "phases": [""]
}

 ```

get.description:
Lists the enrichment policies in the CTIX application.

### Request Parameters

This API endpoint does not require any input parameter.

### Response Parameters

| **Parameter** | **Type** | **Description** |
| --- | --- | --- |
| next | Integer | Returns a link to the next page of pagination. |
| page_size | Integer | Returns the number of records returned per page. |
| previous | Integer | Returns a link to the previous page of pagination. |
| results | Array of Objects | Returns JSON objects for the enrichment details. |
| all_collections | Boolean | Returns true if the policy is configured to receive intel all collections, else returns false. |
| all_inbox_collections | Boolean | Returns true if the policy is configured to receive intel from all inbox type sources, else returns false. |
| all_sources | Boolean | Returns true if the policy is configured to receive intel from all sources, else returns false. |
| component | String | Returns the type of threat data. |
| created | Timestamp | Returns the date and time at which the policy was created in EPOCH format. |
| created_by | String | Returns the name, email and ID of the user who created the policy. |
| enrichment | Array of JSON Objects | Returns the list of enrichment sources and their details used to enrich the threat data. |
| enrichment_run_type | String | Returns the execution style of the policy as sequentially or parallelly. |
| id | String | Returns the policy ID. |
| is_active | Boolean | Returns true if the policy is active, else returns false. |
| is_apply_condition | Boolean | Returns true if a condition is applied to the policy, else returns false. |
| modified | Timestamp | Returns the date and time at which the policy was last modified in EPOCH format. |
| name | String | Returns the name of the policy. |
| object_type | String | Returns the threat data type to enrich. It can be IP, hash, domain, or URL. |
| policy_source | JSON Object | Returns the list of policy sources such as ID, name, and source. |
| priority | Integer | Returns the priority of the policy at which it would be executed. |
| rule | Array of JSON Objects | Returns the list of conditions applied to the policy. |
| status | String | Returns the status of policy such as ACTIVE or INACTIVE. |
| updated_by | String | Returns the name of the user who last modified the policy. |
| total | Integer | Returns the total number of records retrieved. |

parameters.name: q
parameters.description: Pass the enrichment policiy name to retrieve the policy.

parameters.name: is_active
parameters.description: Pass true to retrieve active policies, else pass false.

parameters.name: created_by_id
parameters.description: Pass the user ID to retrieve policies created by the particular user.

parameters.name: updated_by_id
parameters.description: Pass the user ID to retrieve policies updated by the particular user.

parameters.name: created_from
parameters.description: Pass the created from date in EPOCH format to retrieve policies created in the provided timestamp.

parameters.name: created_to
parameters.description: Pass the created to date in EPOCH format to retrieve policies created in the provided timestamp.

parameters.name: sort
parameters.description: Pass the sorting order for the enrichment policy, by default they are sorted in the desc order of their created time.

parameters.name: object_type
parameters.description: Pass the object type to filter the enrichment policies on the object type specified in the policy such as IP, hash, domain, or URL.

parameters.name: published_collections
parameters.description: Pass the collection ID to filter the enrichment policies based on published collection ids

parameters.name: collection_id
parameters.description: Pass the collection ID to filter the enrichment policies based on collection ID

parameters.name: source_id
parameters.description: Pass the source ID to filter the enrichment policies based on source ID

200.description: list of policies / Title filter / Active filter / Indicator type filter / Source id filter / collection id filter / published collection id filter

schema.example: GET, POST, PUT, PATCH, DELETE, HEAD, OPTIONS

get.description:
Returns the list of enrichment tools configured in CTIX.

This endpoint does not require any request parameters.

| --- | --- | --- |
| page_limit | Integer | Returns the number of records retrieved per page. |
| results | Array | Returns an array of enrichment tools |
| id | String | Returns the ID of the tool |
| app_slug | String | Returns the Slug value of the tool. The Slug refers to a human-readable unique identifier that can be used to identify a resource. |

| app_name | String | Returns the name of the tool. |
| is_active | Boolean | Returns true if the tool is active, else returns false. |
| total | Integer | Returns the total number of enrichment tools available in CTIX. |

parameters.name: action_name
parameters.description: Specify a list of comma-separated action names, for example: get_ip for IPs, get_domain for Domain, get_url for URL, get_cve for Vulnerability

parameters.name: component
parameters.description: Use this filter to get the enrichment tools list by a component. For example, if you specify the component as investigation,  it returns only those apps whose enrichment is supported in threat-investigation

get.description:
Retrieves a list of activity logs of a user in the platform.

#### Request Parameters

This API endpoint does not require any request parameter.

#### Response Parameters

| **Parameter** | **Type** | **Description** |
| --- | --- | --- |
| next | String | Returns a link to the next page of the response. |
| previous | String | Returns a link to the previous page of the response. |
| page_size | Integer | Returns the number of logs returned per page. |
| total | Integer | Returns the total number of logs available in the platform. |
| access_id | String | Returns the access ID used by the user to access the platform via open API. Returns null if accessed using the user interface. |
| api | String | Returns the API endpoint used. |
| api_name | String | Returns the name of the API used. |
| api_start_time | Timestamp | Returns the start time of the API request process in EPOCH format. |
| api_end_time | Timestamp | Returns the end time of the API request process in EPOCH format. |
| api_process_time | Float | returns the total time taken to process the API request in seconds. |
| error_response_data | String | Returns a message if the API request results in an error. |
| ip_address | String | Returns the IP address of the server. |
| method | String | Returns HTTP request method used. |
| openapi_id | String | Returns the ID of the open API. Returns null if accessed using the user interface. |
| response | Integer | Returns the HTTP response code. |
| user | String | Returns the email ID of the user. |
| user_id | String | Returns the unique ID of the user. |
| user_agent | String | Returns the browser or platform used by the user to perform the activity. |

parameters.name: page
parameters.description: Pass the page number to retrieve logs. Default: 1

parameters.name: page_size
parameters.description: Pass the number of logs to revtrieve per page. Default: 10

parameters.name: sort
parameters.description: Pass the parameter to sort logs. By default logs are returned in descending order (latest logs are returned first) based on the created time.

parameters.name: timestamp_from
parameters.description: Pass the created time in EPOCH format from which you want to retrieve logs.

parameters.name: timestamp_to
parameters.description: Pass the created time in EPOCH format until which you want to retrieve logs.

parameters.name: response
parameters.description: Pass the HTTP status code to filter logs. Allowed values: 200, 201, 206, 400, 401, 402, 403, 404, 429, and 500.

parameters.name: method
parameters.description: Pass the HTTP request methiod to filter logs. Allowed values: get, put, post, and delete.

parameters.name: q

get.description:
Retrieves a list of activity logs of a subscriber in the platform.

#### Request Parameters

This API endpoint does not require any request parameter.

#### Response Parameters

| **Parameter** | **Type** | **Description** |
| --- | --- | --- |
| next | String | Returns a link to the next page of the response. |
| previous | String | Returns a link to the previous page of the response. |
| page_size | Integer | Returns the number of logs returned per page. |
| total | Integer | Returns the total number of logs available in the platform. |
| id | String | Returns the unique ID of the log. |
| api | String | Returns the API endpoint used. |
| error_message | String | Returns message if the request results in an error. |
| collection_id | Array | Returns a list of the IDs of the associated collections. |
| feed_count | Integer | Returns the number of feeds. |
| subscriber_name | String | Returns the name of the subscriber. |
| subscriber_id | String | Returns the ID of the subscriber. |
| response_code | Integer | Returns the HTTP response code. |
| collection_name | String | Returns the name of the name of the associated collection from which data is polled or inboxed. |
| ip_address | String | Returns the IP address of the server. |
| request_headers | String | Returns the headers passed with the API request in key-value pairs. |
| request_method | String | Returns the HTTP request method used. |
| response_time | Float | Returns the total time taken to respond in seconds. |
| action | String | Returns the type of action made. |
| timestamp | Timestamp | Returns the creation time of the log in EPOCH format. |
| organization_name | String | Returns the organization name associated with the user. Returns the subscriber name if there is no organization associated with the subscriber. |
| request_data | String | Returns the data passed with the API request. |
| taxii_version | String | Returns the STIX version. |

parameters.name: page
parameters.description: Pass the page number to retrieve logs. Default: 1

parameters.name: page_size
parameters.description: Pass the number of logs to revtrieve per page. Default: 10

parameters.name: timestamp_from
parameters.description: Pass the created time in EPOCH format from which you want to retrieve logs.

parameters.name: timestamp_to
parameters.description: Pass the created time in EPOCH format until which you want to retrieve logs.

parameters.name: response_code
parameters.description: Pass the HTTP status code to filter logs. Allowed values: 200, 201, 206, 400, 401, 402, 403, 404, 429, and 500.

parameters.name: request_method
parameters.description: Pass the HTTP request methiod to filter logs. Allowed values: get, put, post, and delete.

parameters.name: collection_id
parameters.description: Pass the unique ID of a collection to filter logs.

parameters.name: action
parameters.description: Pass the action type of the subscriber. Allowed values: Inbox, Polling, Discovery, Collection Detail, Object Status, Taxii API root, Collection List, Object List, Object Detail, Collection Manifest.

parameters.name: sort
parameters.description: Pass the parameter to sort logs. By default logs are returned in descending order (latest logs are returned first) based on the created time.

parameters.name: q
parameters.description: Pass the query text to search logs.

parameters.name: subscriber_id
parameters.description: Pass the unique ID of a subscriber.

get.description:
Retrieves a list of logs of the configuration changes in the platform.

#### Request Parameters

This API endpoint does not require any request parameter.

#### Response Parameters

| **Parameter** | **Type** | **Description** |
| --- | --- | --- |
| next | String | Returns a link to the next page of the response. |
| previous | String | Returns a link to the previous page of the response. |
| page_size | Integer | Returns the number of logs returned per page. |
| total | Integer | Returns the total number of logs available in the platform. |
| id | String | Returns the unique ID of the log. |
| created | Timestamp | Returns the created time of the log in EPOCH format. |
| modified | Timestamp | Returns the modified time of the log in EPOCH format. |
| request_ip | String | Returns IP address of the server. |
| user_id | String | Returns the unique ID of the user who modified the configuration. |
| user_email | String | Returns the email address of the user who modified the configuration. |
| section | String | Returns the configuration section that is modified. |
| entity_id | String | Returns the ID of the ID of the entity that is modified. |
| entity_type | String | Returns the type of entity that is modified. |
| entity_value | String | Returns the value of entity that is modified. |
| action | String | Returns the type of configuration change performed, such as added, edited, or deleted. |
| old_value | JSON Object | Returns the previous value of the field. |
| new_value | JSON Object | Returns the current value of the field. |
| field | String | Returns the name of the field that is modified. |

get.description:
Returns the configurations related to the tenant. #### Request Parameters None #### Response Parameters | **Parameter** | **Type** | **Description** | | --- | --- | --- | | id | String | Returns the ID of the tenant configuration. | | tenant_name | String | Returns the name of the tenant. | | tenant_code | String | Returns the code given for the tenant. | | server_url | String | Returns the domain name of the server. | | tlp | String | Returns the value of the default TLP.
White, Amber, Green, None, Yellow | | apart_polling_max_feeds | Integer | Returns the maximum number of feeds to poll at a single time. | | max_source_limit | Integer | Returns the maximum number of source configured. | | max_polling_time | Integer | Returns the time interval at which the CTIX tenant will automatically retrieve the Threat Intel Packages from the configured sources. | | max_upload_file_size | Integer | Returns the maximum file size that could be uploaded. | | email_sleep_time | Integer | Returns the time interval at which the application will attempt to retry connecting to the configured Email Inbox server. | | email_number_of_retry | Integer | Returns the number of times the application attempts to connect to the configured Email inbox server. | | parse_urls_without_scheme | Boolean | Returns true to parse URL without schemes, else returns false. | | parse_domain_from_url | Boolean | Returns true if Threat Mail Box and RSS Feeds will automatically parse Domain values from URLs, else returns false. | | parse_domain_from_email_address | Boolean | Returns true if Threat Mail Box and RSS Feeds will automatically parse Domain values from Emails, else returns false. | | parse_email_from_url | Boolean | Returns true if Threat Mail Box and RSS Feeds will automatically parse Emails from URLs, else returns false. | | parse_file_paths | Boolean | Returns true if Threat Mail Box and RSS Feeds will automatically parse file paths, else returns false. | | is_active | Boolean | Returns true if the tenant is enabled, else returns false if disabled. | The response body will contain the configurations related to the tenant, including the ID, tenant name, server URL, TLP value, maximum polling time, maximum source limit, and various other configuration parameters.

get.description:
Retrieves the authentication configuration.

#### Request Parameters

None

#### Response Parameters

| **Parameter** | **Type** | **Description** |
| --- | --- | --- |
| notification_expiry_time | Integer | Returns the number of days in which the notifications expire. |
| activity_timeout | Bool | Returns True if the user logs out in case of inactivity, else returns False. |
| activity_timeout_time | Integer | Returns the minutes after which the user automatically will be logged out due to inactivity if enabled. |
| password_tries | Integer | Returns the maximum number of tries a user can attempt after which the user account will either be temporary or permanently blocked. |
| is_temporary_lockout | Bool | Returns True if the user has been blocked permanently or temporarily, else returns False. |
| lock_out_time | Integer | Returns the minutes after which the user account unblocks if blocked temporarily. |
| account_deactivation_enabled | Bool | Returns True if the user account blocks if not logged in for the configured days, else returns False. |
| max_inactive_days | Integer | Returns the maximum number of inactive days a user account can have before getting blocked. |
| concurrent_sessions | Bool | Returns True if a user can generate multiple authentication tokens at a time, else returns False. |
| jwt_token_expiry | Integer | Returns the expiration time of the JWT token. |
| two_factor_auth | Bool | Returns True if two-factor authentication is enabled, else returns False. |
| two_factor_auth_type | String | Returns the type of two-factor authentication enabled, such as email or TOTP. |
| allow_forgot_password_mail | Bool | Returns True if the forgot password policy has been enabled, else returns False. |
| otp_expiry_time | String | Returns the minutes after which OTP expires if sent over email. |
| password_link_expiry_time | Integer | Returns the time after which the reset password link expires if sent over email. |
| session_auth | Bool | Returns True if a user can open CTIX in multiple windows simultaneously, else returns False. |
| max_inactive_alert_days | Integer | Returns the number of inactive days, if a user has not logged into the application for a specific period of time as a reminder before the configured days expires. |
| recaptcha | Bool | Returns True if the re-captcha has been enabled, else returns False. |

Retrieves the firewall rules defined for a Tenant. This API either allows all the requested IPs or Countries to access the application or block all the IPs or Countries.

#### Request Parameters

This API endpoint does not require any input parameters.

#### Response Parameters (Configuration Key)

| **Parameter** | **Type** | **Description** |
| --- | --- | --- |
| restricted_access | Boolean | Returns True if the firewall is enabled, else returns False. |
| blacklist | Boolean | Returns True if specific traffic is allowed, else returns False. |

#### Response Parameters (Firewall List Key)

| **Parameter** | **Type** | **Description** |
| --- | --- | --- |
| id | String | Returns the unique ID of the firewall rule. |
| reason | String | Returns the reason for adding a user to the rule. |
| is_active | Bool | Returns True if a rule has been applied on the traffic, else returns False. |
| type | String | Returns the type for which this rule has been defined. Rule type such as CIDR, Country. |
| value | String | Returns the value on which the rule has been applied. It can be IP or Country name based on type. |
| created_at | Integer | Returns the date and time of the rule creation. |
| updated_at | Integer | Returns the date and time when the rule has been updated. |

Retrieves the system notification configuration for email feed sources.

#### Response Parameters

| Parameter | Type | Description |
| --- | --- | --- |
| connection_failures | Object | Configuration for connection failure notifications |
| no_data_received | Object | Configuration for no data received notifications |

Each configuration object includes the following parameters:

- `is_enabled`: A boolean indicating if the notification is enabled.
    
- `is_notify_default`: A boolean indicating if the default notification is enabled.
    
- `is_notify_via`: An array of strings specifying the notification methods.
    
- `notify_before`: An integer specifying the time before notification.
    
- `notify_frequency`: A string specifying the frequency of notification.
    
- `user_groups`: An array of user groups for notification.
    
- `users`: An array of users for notification.

Retrieves the system notification configuration for internal failure reports.

#### Response Parameters

| Parameter | Type | Description |
| --- | --- | --- |
| failed_rules | Object | Object containing configuration for failed rules |
| subscriber_error | Object | Object containing configuration for subscriber error |

Each configuration object includes the following parameters:

- `is_enabled`: A boolean indicating if the notification is enabled.
    
- `is_notify_default`: A boolean indicating if the default notification is enabled.
    
- `is_notify_via`: An array of strings specifying the notification methods.
    
- `notify_before`: An integer specifying the time before notification.
    
- `notify_frequency`: A string specifying the frequency of notification.
    
- `user_groups`: An array of user groups for notification.
    
- `users`: An array of users for notification.

Retrieves the system notification configuration for the OpenAPI expiry report.

### Response

| Parameter | Type | Description |
| --- | --- | --- |
| openapi.is_enabled | boolean | Indicates if the OpenAPI notification is enabled. |
| openapi.is_notify_default | boolean | Indicates if the default notification is enabled. |
| openapi.is_notify_via | array | List of notification methods. |
| openapi.notify_before | integer | Number of minutes before notification. |
| openapi.notify_frequency | string | Frequency of notification. |
| openapi.user_groups | array | List of user groups to be notified. |
| openapi.users | array | List of users to be notified. |

Retrieves all the custom scores.

This endpoint does not require any request parameters.

## Response Parameters

| Parameter | Type | Description |
| --- | --- | --- |
| results | Array of JSON Objects | Returns an array of custom scores. |
| id | String | Returns the ID of the custom score. |
| name | String | Returns the name of the custom score. |
| api_key | String | Returns the API key of the custom score. |
| helptext | String | Returns the help text of the custom score. |
| field_type | String | Returns the field type. Possible values: `integer`, `select`, `text`. |
| values | Array of strings | Returns a list of allowed field values. Applicable for the `select` field type. |
| is_deprecated | Boolean | Returns true if the custom score is deprecated, else false. |

post.description:
Creates a new custom score. You can add maximum of five custom scores. ### Request Parameters | Parameter | Type | Required | Description | | --- | --- | --- | --- | | name | String | Required | Pass the name of the custom score. | | helptext | String | Optional | Pass the help text for the custom score. | | field_type | String | Required | Pass the type of field for the custom score. You can specify one of the following field type:
`integer`: Allows you to enter a text value for the custom score.
`text`: Allows you to enter an integer value for the custom score.
`select`: Allows you to select one of the pre-defined list of values for the custom score. | | values | Array of strings | Optional | Pass a list of allowed values for the custom score. Required if field type is `select`. | ### Response Returns success message after creating the custom score.

| previous | String | Returns the link to the previous page |
| page_size | Integer | Returns the maximum number of elements that can be present on a page. |
| total | Integer | Returns the total record count. |
| results | Array of Objects | Returns the list of collection objects. See the Collection Parameters table for details |

#### **Collection Parameters**

| --- | --- | --- |
| id | String | Returns the collection ID. |
| name | String | Returns the collection name. |

Retrieves all tags from Intel Exchange.

### Request Parameters

This endpoint does not require any request parameters.

| results | Array of JSON Objects | Returns an array of results which consists of tags in JSON objects |
| colour_code | String | Returns the hex key of the colour code which denotes type of the tag. |
| created | Timestamp | Returns the EPOCH time of tag creation. |
| created_by | JSON Object | Returns the details of the user who created the tag. |
| id | String | Returns the tag ID. |
| is_active | Boolean | Returns true if the tag is enabled, else false. |
| modified | Timestamp | Retuns the last modified time in EPOCH format. |
| modified_by | JSON Object | Returns the details of the user who last modified the tag. |
| name | String | Returns the name of the tag. |

| user_groups | Array of JSON Objects | Returns the array of user groups associated with tag. Applicable for privilaged access tags. |
| total | Integer | Returns the total number of tags. |

Creates a tag in the CTIX platform. #### Request Parameters | **Parameter** | **Type** | **Required** | **Description** | | --- | --- | --- | --- | | name | String | Mandatory | Pass a unique name for the tag within 50 characters. | | colour_code | String | Mandatory | Pass the HEX key of a color code for the tag.
Allowed values:
`#5236E2`
`#0068FA`
`#EB9C00`
`#FF5330`
`#27865F`
`#C4C81D`
`#00A2C2`
`#C341E7`
`#AD6B76`
`#95A1B1` | #### Response Parameters | **Parameters** | **Type** | **Description** | | --- | --- | --- | | id | String | Returns the unique ID of a tag. | | name | String | Returns the name of the tag. | | colour_code | String | Returns the color defined for the tag. | | created | Timestamp | Returns the created date and time of a tag in EPOCH format. | | created_by | String | Returns the ID of the user who created the tag. | | modified_by | String | Returns the ID of the user who last modified the tag details. | | modified | Timestamp | Returns the modified date and time of a tag in EPOCH format. | | type | String | Returns the type of tag.

You can create a maximum of 15 tags in one API request. ### Request Parameters | Parameter | Type | Required | Description | | --- | --- | --- | --- | | name | String | Required | Pass a list of tag names separated by a comma within 5000 characters. | | tag_type | String | Required | Pass the type of the tag. You can create one of the following tags:
`user`: Tags created by the Intel Exchange users
`system`: Tags that the users create for use within Intel Exchange.
`privilaged`: Tags that enables you to restrict user access to the associated threat data objects. | | user_groups | Array | Optional
Required if `tag_type=privilaged` | Pass an array of user groups associated with the tag. Applicable for privilaged access tags. | | action | String | Required | Pass the action to be performed on the tags. Allowed values: `add`. | ### Response Parameters | Parameter | Type | Description | | --- | --- | --- | | result | JSON Object | Returns the result of the bulk action. | | details | String | Returns the details of the action performed. | | count | Integer | Returns the number of tags created. |
